content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (from the agent domain) can be repurposed to dynamically prioritize which new experiences an active learning agent stores in its long-term memory, cutting redundant memory footprint while improving out-of-distribution generalization for 2024-2025 SOTA agent architectures. This replaces static memory pruning rules with a self-organizing selection that aligns memory growth with the agent's ongoing learning goals.
